findings.description: The XML code example was modified from the source. The source uses `<header>` and `<data>` (opening-tag syntax) as closing tags, while the knowledge file changed them to `</header>` and `</data>` (proper closing tags). The code was not faithfully reproduced from the source.
findings.source_evidence:
Source: `  <header>
    <msg_id>123456</msg_id>
  <header>` and `  <data>
    <name>nablarch</name>
    <age>30</age>
  <data>` — knowledge file shows `</header>` and `</data>` instead.

findings.description: The XML code example was modified from the source. The source uses `<header>` and `<data>` (opening-tag syntax) as closing tags for all repeated `<data>` blocks, while the knowledge file changed them to `</header>` and `</data>`. The code was not faithfully reproduced from the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `  <header>\n    <msg_id>123456</msg_id>\n  <header>` and each `<data>` block ends with `  <data>` — knowledge file shows `</header>` and `</data>` instead.
